listings.description: QR Code Link to This Post Premium Autos - El Monte STOCK #: 305081 CALL : (626) 899-9640 📞 OR TEXT: (626) 548-2409 COPY THIS LINK AND PASTE TO YOUR BROWSER FOR MORE INFORMATION: https://atmxi.com/CL-UTsT Experience the future of driving with this 2020 Tesla Model X Long Range Plus, a used electric SUV that combines luxury, performance, and cutting-edge technology. With a striking Pearl White Multi-Coat exterior and sleek black interior, this vehicle offers both style and practicality. Powered by dual motors delivering up to 518 horsepower and 487 lb-ft of torque, it provides impressive acceleration and seamless all-wheel drive performance. Its 124,935 miles are complemented by features like adaptive cruise control, backup camera, blind spot monitor, and collision warning, ensuring safety on every journey. The Model X comes equipped with heated seats, rear heated seats, keyless entry, memory seats, navigation, push start, and a sunroof/moonroof—creating a comfortable, connected driving experience. It also offers Bluetooth, satellite radio readiness, and a tow package, making it a versatile choice for both daily commutes and weekend adventures. This SUV’s advanced safety and security features underscore Tesla’s commitment to protection. Traffic sign recognition with adaptive speed limiting helps maintain safe driving speeds, while dual front knee airbags and a comprehensive camera system—including front, rear, and side recordings—enhance awareness and response. Parking sensors at the front and rear assist with maneuvering, complemented by a regenerative braking system that improves efficiency. Dash cameras record in all directions, providing added security. The vehicle’s robust safety suite is rounded out by four-wheel ABS, ensuring optimal stopping power in varied conditions, making this Model X a secure choice for families and tech enthusiasts alike. 2020 Tesla Model X Safety and Security Features This vehicle is equipped with traffic sign recognition and adaptive speed limiting, helping drivers stay within safe limits. Dual front knee airbags and dual front airbags provide essential protection in a collision. Front camera systems improve visibility, while parking sensors at the front and rear assist with tight spaces. The regenerative braking system enhances efficiency and extends brake life. Dash cameras record front, rear, and side views, offering security footage when needed. Four-wheel ABS ensures reliable braking performance, adding confidence to every drive. 2020 Tesla Model X Entertainment and Technology Features The Tesla Model X features a 17-inch infotainment touchscreen that delivers intuitive control over navigation, media, and vehicle settings. Its Tesla App enables smart device integration, allowing your phone to serve as a key, and provides remote monitoring and control. The sound system boasts 11 speakers and a 560-watt amplifier, with a subwoofer for rich audio quality. Wi-Fi hotspot compatibility keeps you connected on the go, and HD radio offers a variety of entertainment options. Voice-operated radio and a touch screen display streamline access to your favorite music and apps, making every drive engaging and effortless. 2020 Tesla Model X Performance Features This Model X offers an impressive 351 miles per charge, making long trips easier without frequent stops. Its active air suspension adjusts ride height and comfort levels, while electronic suspension control allows driver customization for a smooth or sporty feel. The lithium-ion battery provides reliable power, and the self-leveling suspension maintains stability on uneven terrain. Charging the battery on 240V takes approximately 12 hours, ensuring convenient overnight recharges. Pneumatic rear springs contribute to a comfortable ride, combining performance and luxury seamlessly in this used SUV. This used vehicle features a striking Pearl White Multi-Coat exterior complemented by a sleek black interior, combining style with practicality. With 105,349 miles on the odometer, this all-wheel-drive electric SUV delivers impressive performance, boasting 328 horsepower and 387 lb-ft of torque. Its advanced features include a backup camera, blind spot monitor, Bluetooth connectivity, collision warning, heated seats, keyless entry, memory seats, navigation, push start, rear A/C, and a sunroof/moonroof. The six-seat interior configuration offers additional flat-folding third-row seating, providing space for up to six adults and enhancing versatility. This model is equipped with rear air conditioning and heating, ensuring comfort for all passengers on every journey. This Tesla Model X combines cutting-edge safety features with modern convenience. It is equipped with traffic sign recognition and adaptive speed limiting, enhancing driving awareness. Dual front knee airbags and front camera systems provide added security, while parking sensors at the front and rear make maneuvering easier. The regenerative braking system, 4-wheel ABS, auto-locking power door locks, and electronic parking brake contribute to a safe driving experience, giving peace of mind in various conditions. Its suite of safety technology ensures both driver and passenger security, making it a reliable choice for daily commuting or family trips. 2016 Tesla Model X Safety and Security Features This model offers a comprehensive safety package, including traffic sign recognition and adaptive speed limiting for better road awareness. Dual front knee airbags and front camera systems provide crucial protection, while parking sensors assist with tight spaces. The regenerative braking system boosts efficiency and safety, complemented by 4-wheel ABS for optimal stopping power. Auto-locking power door locks and an electronic parking brake add convenience and security, ensuring the vehicle remains secure when parked or in motion. 2016 Tesla Model X Entertainment and Technology Features The Tesla Model X is equipped with a large 17-inch infotainment touchscreen that serves as the control hub for entertainment and navigation. Compatibility with the Tesla App allows remote access for vehicle monitoring and control. Wi-Fi hotspot capability keeps passengers connected, while voice-operated and HD radio offer diverse audio options. The system includes nine speakers, real-time traffic data, and internet radio via TuneIn, providing a seamless multimedia experience. An auxiliary USB input adds versatility for personal devices, making every ride enjoyable and connected. 2016 Tesla Model X Performance Features This Model X offers an impressive electric range of 238 miles per charge, powered by a lithium-ion battery. Charging the battery on a 240V outlet takes approximately 12 hours, making overnight charging convenient. The full-time all-wheel-drive system ensures stable handling and traction across various road conditions, enhancing both safety and performance. With its efficient electric motor and advanced drivetrain, this SUV delivers smooth acceleration and reliable power for daily driving and longer trips alike. Weighing just 0.0571 tons, this used Model X offers impressive acceleration with 518 horsepower and 487 lb-ft of torque, ensuring quick response and powerful driving dynamics. Its AWD drivetrain provides confident handling in all conditions, while the spacious four-door body and seating for five make it perfect for family outings or daily commutes. The Model X’s electric powertrain offers an estimated 295 miles per charge, making long trips easier without the need for frequent stops. Additional features include a panoramic sunroof, heated rear seats, and a tow package, enhancing convenience and versatility. Modern safety features like a backup camera, blind spot monitor, collision warning, and parking sensors help keep you secure on the road, while the intuitive navigation system and Bluetooth connectivity add to the driving experience. This used Tesla Model X is equipped with a suite of cutting-edge entertainment and technology features. Its 17-inch infotainment touchscreen delivers easy access to apps, navigation, and media, complemented by 11 high-quality speakers and a subwoofer for immersive sound. The vehicle supports Wi-Fi hotspot connectivity and is compatible with the Tesla App, allowing you to use your smartphone as a key. Voice-operated HD radio ensures clear listening, with 560 watts of power for a rich audio experience. Additional features like a front dash camera, side and rear cameras, and a touch screen display make this SUV as tech-savvy as it is stylish, providing entertainment and safety at every turn. 2019 Tesla Model X Safety and Security Features The vehicle includes advanced safety systems such as traffic sign recognition with adaptive speed limiting, dual front knee airbags, and a comprehensive camera system with front recording. Parking sensors are installed at both front and rear to assist with maneuvering, while regenerative braking helps improve efficiency. Dash cams record front, rear, and side footage for added security. The Model X also features ABS on all four wheels and a self-leveling suspension to maintain stability and ride comfort. These safety measures make this SUV a secure choice for daily driving and long-distance travel. 2019 Tesla Model X Entertainment and Technology Features This SUV boasts a large 17-inch infotainment touchscreen that provides seamless access to navigation, media, and vehicle controls. The Tesla App transforms your phone into a key, offering remote start, climate control, and vehicle monitoring. With 11 speakers and a dedicated subwoofer, the sound system delivers high-quality audio throughout the cabin. Wi-Fi hotspot capability keeps you connected, while voice-operated HD radio ensures entertainment on the go. The vehicle’s touchscreen interface and premium audio system create an engaging and convenient driving environment. 2019 Tesla Model X Performance Features The Model X’s electric motor offers an impressive 295 miles per charge, supported by advanced lithium-ion batteries. The SUV features active and air suspension systems, providing a smooth ride and adjustable height for different terrains. Electronic suspension control allows you to customize ride comfort, while driver-adjustable suspension height and ride control enhance handling. The self-leveling pneumatic suspension maintains optimal ride height, and the electric motor’s 12-hour charging time on 240V outlets ensures minimal downtime. These performance features combine to deliver a dynamic yet efficient driving experience. Its all-wheel-drive system ensures confident handling in various conditions, while the spacious five-passenger interior includes heated seats, rear heated seats, and memory seat options to enhance your driving experience. The SUV is equipped with modern features such as a sunroof, Bluetooth connectivity, a navigation system, push start, keyless entry, and satellite radio readiness, making every journey enjoyable and convenient. Additional utility features include a tow package and a backup camera, all designed to meet your daily needs with style and safety. This Tesla Model X also comes equipped with advanced safety and security features to protect you on the road. It includes traffic sign recognition with adaptive speed limiting, dual front knee airbags, and a front camera system for enhanced visibility. Parking sensors in the front and rear assist with maneuvering, while a regenerative braking system improves efficiency. For added security, there are front, rear, and side dash cameras recording your surroundings, along with ABS for optimal braking performance. These features work together to provide peace of mind during every drive, combining innovative technology with comprehensive safety measures. 2019 Tesla Model X Safety and Security Features This SUV’s safety package starts with traffic sign recognition and adaptive speed limiting to help keep you aware of road conditions. Dual front knee airbags and front camera systems add protection, while parking sensors in both the front and rear make parking easier. The regenerative braking system enhances efficiency and safety, complemented by front, rear, and side dash cameras that record your surroundings. Four-wheel ABS ensures reliable stopping power in all conditions, giving you confidence behind the wheel. 2019 Tesla Model X Entertainment and Technology Features The Model X features a large 17-inch infotainment touchscreen that serves as the command center for entertainment and navigation. It supports a Tesla App that allows you to use your phone as a key, offering seamless access and control. The sound system includes 11 speakers with a 560-watt amplifier and a subwoofer, delivering rich audio quality. Wi-Fi hotspot compatibility, HD radio, and voice-activated radio functions keep you connected and entertained on the go, making every drive engaging and convenient. 2019 Tesla Model X Performance Features Powered by a lithium-ion battery, this Model X offers an estimated 250 miles per charge, suitable for daily commuting and longer trips. The vehicle features active and air suspension systems with electronic control, allowing you to adjust ride height and suspension stiffness for optimal comfort. Self-leveling suspension maintains a smooth ride, while driver-adjustable ride control enhances handling. The electric motor's quick charging capability of 12 hours on 240V outlets ensures minimal downtime, and the pneumatic rear spring provides a refined driving experience.
